panels.description: Active and pending Prometheus alerts for the openstack-instance-exporter job (firing, pending, recovering, and error states only).
panels.title: OpenStack Instance Exporter Alerts

panels.description: up{job="openstack-instance-exporter"} per hypervisor; 1 = exporter responding to scrapes, 0 = exporter down or scrape failures.
panels.title: Exporter Up Status per Hypervisor

panels.description: scrape_samples_scraped for each openstack-instance-exporter instance; used to spot unexpected metric/cardinality growth per hypervisor.
panels.title: Exporter Scrape Sample Count

panels.description: scrape_duration_seconds{job="openstack-instance-exporter"}; time Prometheus spends scraping each exporter instance per hypervisor.
panels.title: Exporter Scrape Duration per Hypervisor

panels.description: oie_host_collection_cycle_duration_seconds; wall-clock time for a full exporter background collection loop per hypervisor.
panels.title: Host Collection Cycle Duration

panels.description: oie_host_conntrack_read_duration_seconds; time spent enumerating conntrack flows during each background collection cycle.
panels.title: Conntrack Collection Duration

panels.description: oie_host_libvirt_list_duration_seconds; time spent listing domains and pulling libvirt stats per background collection cycle.
panels.title: Libvirt Background Collector Duration

panels.description: oie_host_cache_cleanup_duration_seconds; time spent pruning stale entries from the exporter static and dynamic caches per hypervisor.
panels.title: Cache Cleanup Duration

panels.description: increase(oie_host_collection_errors_total[$__rate_interval]); number of background collection errors on each hypervisor over the selected rate interval.
panels.title: Exporter Internal Collection Errors

panels.description: rate(process_cpu_seconds_total{job="openstack-instance-exporter"}[$__rate_interval]); CPU seconds per second used by the exporter process on each hypervisor.
panels.title: Exporter Process CPU Usage

panels.description: process_resident_memory_bytes{job="openstack-instance-exporter"}; resident memory (RSS) used by the exporter process. Spikes can correlate with very large conntrack tables during abuse and drop back once flows clear.
panels.title: Exporter RSS (Resident Memory)

panels.description: Blended 0–100 signal of resource load and threat activity. Higher values mean a VM is busier or noisier — not necessarily bad, just more attention-worthy. Threshold set in exporter flags.
panels.title: Cluster Instance Attention Score (Top 100)

panels.description: Blended 0–100 signal of resource load. Higher values mean a VM is busier — not necessarily bad, just more attention-worthy. Threshold set in exporter flags.
panels.title: Cluster Instance Resource Score (Top 100)

panels.description: Blended 0–100 signal of threat load. Higher values mean a VM is noisier — not necessarily bad, just more attention-worthy. Threshold set in exporter flags - tied to minimum attention score being met.
panels.title: Cluster Instance Threat Score (Top 100)

panels.description: Effective vCPU demand compared to physical hypervisor threads: 100 * sum((oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_percent / 100) * oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_count) / sum(oie_host_cpu_threads). Values >100% indicate oversubscription.
panels.title: Instance CPU Usage vs Cluster Physical Threads

panels.description: Total number of active instances in the cluster as reported by oie_instance_info.
panels.title: Cluster Active Instances

panels.description:
CPU and RAM commit against physical host capacity. 100% = 1:1; values >100% reflect Nova allocation ratios and pinning.
CPU: oie_host_cpu_active_vcpus / oie_host_cpu_threads
RAM: oie_instance_mem_allocated_mb / oie_host_mem_mb_total
panels.title: Cluster CPU and Ram Commit Ratio

panels.description: Distribution of instances by Nova flavor, using count(oie_instance_info) grouped by flavor label.
panels.title: Cluster Flavors by Type

panels.description: Distribution of attached instance disks by disk_type (volumes, local, ultra, premium, etc.) from oie_instance_disk_info.
panels.title: Cluster Attached Disks by Type

panels.description: Total vCPUs allocated across all active instances, from sum(oie_instance_cpu_vcpu_count).
panels.title: Cluster Active vCPUs

panels.description: Live guest memory usage vs total hypervisor RAM capacity (ignores reserved host memory or other allocations for services). Based on 100 * sum(oie_instance_mem_used_mb) / sum(oie_host_mem_mb_total).
panels.title: Instance Ram Usage of Host Ram Total Capacity

panels.description:
Live guest memory usage vs total instance RAM allocation. Shows how much allocated RAM is actually being used.
Series A: sum(oie_instance_mem_used_mb)
Series B: sum(oie_instance_mem_allocated_mb)
panels.title: Live Instance Used vs Instance Allocated

panels.description:
Live guest RAM consumption vs total hypervisor RAM capacity, in MB.
Series A: sum(oie_instance_mem_used_mb)
Series B: sum(oie_host_mem_mb_total)
panels.title: Live Instance Used vs Hypervisor Available

panels.description: Cluster-wide disk throughput (GB/s) from instance reads and writes over a 1m rate window.
panels.title: Cluster Disk Read/Write Throughput

panels.description: Total disk volume (GB) read and written across the cluster over time, using increase(oie_instance_disk_*_gbytes_total[1m]).
panels.title: Cluster Disk Read/Write Totals

panels.description: Aggregate read+write IOPS across all instances, using rate(oie_instance_disk_read_requests_total[1m]) and rate(oie_instance_disk_write_requests_total[1m]).
panels.title: Cluster Read/Write IOPS

panels.description: Cluster network packet rate (RX/TX packets per second) across all instances, using 1m rate windows.
panels.title: Cluster Network TX/RX Packets per Second

panels.description: Cluster network throughput in gigabits per second, based on 8 * rate(oie_instance_net_rx_gbytes_total[1m]) and TX equivalent.
panels.title: Cluster Network TX/RX Data Rate

panels.description: Total active conntrack flows across all instances, from sum(oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows, oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_outbound, oie_instance_conntrack_ip_flows_inbound ). Note the exporter sets a minimum value to filter noise.
panels.title: Cluster Conntrack Flows

panels.description: Total cluster conntrack table utilization as a percentage of net.netfilter.nf_conntrack_max across all hypervisors (scaled 0–100%).
panels.title: Cluster Conntrack Utilization

title: OpenStack Instance Exporter — Cluster & Exporter Overview
